Resolve or build a spline-based PAF lookup closure for one analyte

Source: R/mspaf.R
dot-ssd_paf_lookup.Rd

Returns a stats::splinefun closure that maps log10(conc) to PAF. Shipped tables (NULL guideline_dir + known method/analyte) are loaded from inst/extdata/ssd_paf_lookup.qs2 and cached in the session. Runtime tables are built adaptively and likewise cached.

Usage

.ssd_paf_lookup(analyte, method, fit, guideline_dir)

Arguments

analyte

Analyte name string.

method

SSD method string (e.g. "multi", "anzecc").

fit

fitdists object or NULL. Required for runtime builds.

guideline_dir

Path to ANZG XLSX folder, or NULL for shipped tables.

Value

A splinefun closure, or NULL if the lookup cannot be built.

On this page
